headline: Has The Recent Pullback In DuPont de Nemours (DD) Opened A Valuation Opportunity?
summary: If you are wondering whether DuPont de Nemours is offering good value at its current share price, this article walks through what that price might actually imply. The stock recently closed at US$45.26, with returns of 10.7% year to date and 41.3% over the past year, even though the last 7 days and 30 days saw declines of 9.6% and 3.1% respectively. Recent news coverage has focused on DuPont de Nemours as a materials and specialty chemicals company, with investors watching how its portfolio...
